name: Golfslinger
short_description: An explosive mix of golf and shooting! Use a varied arsenal to launch your balls into a frantic multiplayer chaos! Face off against up to 12 players in stylized Westernpunk environments and prove you're the best of the Golfslingers!
detailed_description:
Have you ever dreamed of shooting a golf ball with a good old revolver?

Golfslinger is here to make that crazy dream come true! Face off against up to 12 players in an explosive WesternPunk showdown where every match is a new chance to prove you're the best shot... or blow everything up!

What awaits you:

● Shoot straight, shoot hard: With an arsenal of revolvers, rifles, and even cannons, send your ball flying through the air to destroy targets, barrels, and pass through rings. Let the gunpowder do the talking and show off your skill with every shot!

● Chaotic multiplayer: Saddle up for frantic matches with up to 12 players where anything goes. Will you be the fastest to draw, or will you bite the dust?

● Easy to pick up, hard to master: With intuitive gameplay based on two key actions: "Shoot" and "Activate Bullet Time," slow down your ball and choose the direction of your shots! To become the best Golfslinger, you'll need to combine speed, precision, map knowledge, and a lot of practice!

● Style that rocks: Customize your guns, your balls, and even your impacts! Whether you're into skulls or rainbow trails, make your style stand out on the field!

● Leave your mark: A global leaderboard? The perfect opportunity to prove you're the best Golfslinger!

● Varied game modes: Whether you're playing for glory or fun, choose from several modes like time trials or explosive duels. Every mode presents a new challenge to overcome!

● A soundtrack worthy of the best saloons: With an original soundtrack composed by a talented musician, let yourself be carried away by frantic riffs blending rock and western. Each level has its own musical ambiance for total immersion!

● Colorful environments: From crystal canyons to runaway steam trains, gigantic pillars to distant oases, every landscape is a wild playground!

"Gun in hand, ball on fire: Master the chaos!"
